message.content: US checkout API requests returned elevated 503 errors after Redis memory exhaustion during a promotion. Capacity was added and service recovered by 14:32 UTC. Some customers retried, but no completed orders were lost.
Vendor API rate limiting delayed the payroll export until 06:18 CT. Internal export generation and payroll calculations were unaffected, and no employee-data exposure is indicated.
Version 4.12 created startup crashes for all Android users because of a confirmed lifecycle bug. The rollout was stopped at 25% and version 4.11 was restored.
